text:
The Egyptian Olympic football teamwill play a heavyweight match against the Spanish Olympic team, in the third round of the group stage of the Paris Olympics.

The Egyptian national team is scheduled to face Spain on Tuesday, in the third match of the group stage of the Paris 2024 Olympics.

The match will start at 4:00 pm Cairo time.

Egypt vs. Spain will be broadcast on the beIN Sports network, in addition to the al-Kass network via open frequencies on the Nilesat satellite.

The Egyptian Olympic football team previously achieved a valuable victory over Uzbekistan, in the match that brought the two teams together in the second round after a draw with the Dominican Republic in the first round.
title: When and where to catch the Egypt vs. Spain football match at Paris Olympics - Egypt Independent
author: Egypt Independent
description: The Egyptian Olympic football team will play a heavyweight match against the Spanish Olympic team, in the third round of the group stage of the Paris Olympics.
